mapper.insert: INSERT INTO UB_LEARNING_REPORT ( REPORT_NUMBER, MATCHING_NUMBER, SUBJECT_NUMBER, SUBJECT_TITLE, SUBJECT_SUMMARY, SUBJECT_CONTENT, REPORT_WEEK, REPORT_SESSION, REPORT_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPORT.nextval, #{matchingNumber}, #{lrSubjectNumber}, #{lrSubjectTitle}, #{lrSubjectSummary}, #{lrSubjectContent}, #{lrReportWeek}, #{lrReportSession}, #{lrReportDate}, SYSTIMESTAMP, NULL )
